response.justification: Strong distributed systems expertise and current Staff role at re:cinq with direct AI-agent infrastructure involvement address key requirements, but critical absence of Python (must-have skill) and limited prior AI/ML product background create significant gaps. Could be excellent fit if Python proficiency is demonstrated or can be quickly acquired.
strengths: Current Staff Engineer at re:cinq with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP experience in AI-native environment
Proven high-throughput distributed systems expertise (Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/sec, async I/O, low-latency architecture)
Staff-level technical leadership across multiple organizations with demonstrated ownership mindset and mentorship capability
concerns: No Python experience listed despite being a must-have skill; background is TypeScript/Node.js dominant
Limited prior AI/ML product background beyond 13 months at re:cinq; lacks depth in AI-native engineering environments
Design patterns and architectural principles mastery not explicitly demonstrated; experience inferred but not called out
